hero_2: Then you open an empty file.
hero_sub: And nothing. A blinking cursor. CodeFast is a course where you write — from the first minute, in your browser, with nothing to install.
hero_note: The first lesson is open. No account needed.
problem_sub: You are not slow. Nobody ever made you write it yourself.
step1_d: It all makes sense. The explanation is clear.
step2_d: Yes, got it. Looks easy enough.
step3_d: Empty file. No idea where to start.
problem_punch: Understanding and writing are two different muscles. Here we train the second one.
pillars_sub: Everything here is built to pull you out of memorising and push you into writing.
p1_d: The first lesson is writing, not theory. The explanation arrives after you have touched something and seen what happens.
p2_d: We show you the broken thing first. The fix only comes once it hurts. That is what makes it stick.
p3_d: Empty editor, just a goal. No starter code. This is where the freezing gets cured — and this is exactly what nobody else does.
p4_d: We hand you broken code with six bugs and no hints. Go find them. That is what the real job looks like.
course_desc: From your first tag to a real site, live online. You write in the browser and see the result instantly.
course_soon: CSS and Python are next. One at a time, no rushing.
ugly_quote: Your page will be ugly. That is not your fault.
ugly_sub: HTML does not make things pretty — it makes structure. Pretty is the job of CSS and it comes later. Anyone promising you a beautiful site on day one is either lying or handing you a template you do not understand.
final_sub: The first lesson takes five minutes. You need nothing — no account, no installs.
